title: SkillSpec v1.0 — SKILL.md frontmatter
description: Machine-readable schema for the YAML frontmatter of a SKILL.md skill package. See SKILLSPEC.md for the full specification including body-section conformance levels.

name.description: Kebab-case identifier. MUST equal the skill's directory name and be unique within a registry.

description.description: The routing surface. MUST contain, in order: what the skill does (one clause); 'Use when …' trigger phrases; 'Produces …' the concrete artifact. At most ~3 sentences plus one optional cross-reference sentence.

version.description: Optional SemVer. Major = breaking Output Format or Execution change. Absent = unversioned (0.x, mutable).

license.description: Optional SPDX license identifier. Absent = inherits the containing repository's license.

metadata.description: Open extension object. Consumers MUST ignore unknown keys.
